title: Connection timeout when connecting Facebook/Meta app
symptom: When attempting to connect a Facebook/Meta app to n8n, the user encounters an 'ERR_CONNECTION_TIMED_OUT' error.
applies_when: Self-hosted n8n with specific port configuration
not_this_if: Using default port without custom configurations
Error does not occur after a few minutes
root_cause: The connection timeout occurs because the OAuth callback URL configured in the Facebook app includes a port that is not reachable. This can happen if the n8n instance is behind a reverse proxy that does not forward the port correctly.
fix_steps: Add the webhook URL without the port to the environment variables
Ensure the Facebook app is configured to use the updated URL
Wait a few minutes for the changes to propagate
agent_instruction: Update the webhook URL in the environment variables to exclude the port and reconfigure the Facebook app.
